description_long: This is a robust adult male figure dressed in rugged, medieval-inspired attire suitable for cold climates. He wears a thick, fur-lined shoulder cape over a padded tunic with a patterned chest piece, and his arms are protected by bracers. A wide belt with pouches and a sheathed dagger is fastened at his waist, and his lower body is covered by a knee-length skirt over fitted trousers. His boots are sturdy and reinforced, designed for rough terrain, and his gloves are thick, providing both warmth and protection. The figure's hair is styled in a distinctive mohawk with shaved sides, giving him a fierce and battle-ready appearance.
description: A rugged adult male in medieval-style, fur-lined clothing with a mohawk hairstyle and sturdy boots, exuding a battle-ready presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed fur cape, patterned chest piece, belt with pouches, and the mohawk hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered clothing, arm bracers, and the profile of the mohawk and facial features.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full fur cape, belt wraps, and the back of the boots and skirt.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm bracers, layered skirt, and the mohawk's shaved side.
attribute_clothing_type: fur-lined cape, padded tunic, bracers, wide belt with pouches, knee-length skirt, fitted trousers
